title: Mild Yeasty Croatian Hake Tagine
description: A light and romantic Croatian dish featuring hake, perfect for a special occasion, this recipe is also sugar free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together yeast, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt.
Let the yeast mixture sit for 5 minutes until it becomes frothy.
In a large ceramic tagine, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the hake fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour the yeast mixture over the hake and onions.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 15 minutes until the hake is cooked through.
